title: Northwest Stampede
writer: Art Arthur, Lillie Hayward, Jean Muir
actors: Joan Leslie, James Craig, Jack Oakie
plot: When his father dies, rodeo star Dan Bennett returns to his ranch but hires on as a ranch hand. A horse known as the White Outlaw is the leader of a herd of wild horses and Dan's obsession now is to capture and tame that horse. Fo...
